changelog: Bakes the cytech-18 device-local work into the repo. (1) Reset-flow audit fixes: maintenance_repair.sh no longer stops the SSH addon (would have broken Reset to Default on the next hostname drift); finish_firstboot.sh traps EXIT to clear .reset_cycle_active if killed (so a crashed finish step can't permanently disable maintenance self-heal); maintenance branch treats .reset_cycle_active as stale after 15 min. (2) Five managed dashboards (Comfort Alarm, Config Files, Remote Access, Reset to Default, System Info) converted from storage to YAML mode -- read-only in the UI to prevent accidental card/YAML deletion; a new ensure_yaml_dashboards() function in first_boot.sh registers them in configuration.yaml and removes the superseded storage registry entries on each device. (3) ensure_reset_dashboard() made a no-op and the finish_firstboot system-dashboard-creation block neutralized (both were recreating storage dashboards that are now YAML). All reset-verified on cytech-18. The landing Overview stays the standard HA Overview (editable); the managed dashboards are separate read-only pages in the sidebar.
warnings: HA will restart automatically after this update (first_boot.sh changed). On the next boot, ensure_yaml_dashboards() registers the 5 managed dashboards as read-only YAML and removes their old storage versions -- a second restart may occur if configuration.yaml changes.

Managed dashboards (Comfort Alarm, Config Files, Remote Access, Reset to Default, System Info) become read-only. Edit /config/dashboards/*.yaml on disk to change them. The standard Overview remains editable for personal cards.
